## Highlights

- **Resume tomorrow where you left off** — open sub-issues carry full state; no transcript replay. (D39)
- **Per-cardinal time tracking** — `time:` + `cumulative:` on every progress comment; per-role rollup on parent. (D39)
- **Take over from a cardinal mid-dispatch** — assign yourself to the sub-issue; cardinal suspends until you clear it. (D39)
- **Release notes you can actually scan** — ≤ 20-word bullets, `(D<N>)` tags, user-value voice enforced. (D40)

## Adopter migration

Nothing to do — D39 activates on the next dispatch under a GitHub-issue-sourced task once `github.repo` is configured. D40 is a framework-internal authoring rule and affects nothing on your side.

**Want to opt out of sub-issue tracking?** One of:

```yaml
# local/framework.config.yaml
dispatch:
  tracking: in-context     # repo-wide; legacy pre-D39 behaviour
```

Or per-task `notrack:` prefix; or `ginee:track:off` label on the parent issue.

| Feature | What you'll notice |
|---|---|
| **D39 sub-issue dispatch** (issue-sourced tasks only) | One sub-issue per cardinal dispatch under the parent; labelled by role + phase + value/complexity. Closing comment carries `## Time spent`. |
| **D40 release-notes protocol** | This sidecar is the first under the new rules — every future release follows the same shape. |

## Per-role context cost — team-lead only

`team-lead` grew **+2,047 bytes (~+3.4%)** since v0.15.0 — D39 + D40 each added a kernel bullet to team-lead's always-loaded surface. **All 6 non-team-lead cardinals unchanged** — both D-decisions placed their rules on team-lead's surface only (after a code-review feedback round on each). Headroom > 30% on every role; no ceiling adjustments needed.

Full per-role snapshot: [`reference/CONTEXT_COSTS.html`](https://kostiantyn-matsebora.github.io/ginee/reference/CONTEXT_COSTS.html).

Full specs: [D39](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/core/MIGRATIONS/D39-sub-issue-dispatch.md) · [D40](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/core/MIGRATIONS/D40-changelog-protocol.md).

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/compare/v0.15.0...v0.16.0
